label: PCF8574 Demo
info:
Button-controlled LED mirror using the PCF8574 IO expander.

Hardware:
- P0–P3: LEDs (anode → VCC, cathode → pin; active-low)
- P4–P7: push buttons (pin → GND when pressed)

How it works:
1. An Inject node fires every 200 ms.
2. The PCF8574 node receives { port: 0 } and returns the full 8-bit port byte.
3. A Function node extracts bits 4–7 (buttons), inverts them, and sends { pin: N, value: V } for each LED (P0–P3).
4. Four separate PCF8574 nodes (one per LED) write the individual pin values.
5. A Debug node shows the raw port byte.

To observe: press any button and watch the corresponding LED toggle.

name: Mirror buttons→LEDs
